description: The university Media Arts equipment room is extremely busy during mid-term projects. Process short-term equipment loans and handle a damaged return. Create a 'Short-Term Loan' status label (Type: 'Deployable', Color: '#9C27B0', Show in Nav: Yes). Check out Asset Tag 'LIB-MAC-001' to Emily Chen (echen) and Asset Tag 'LIB-MAC-002' to Marcus Johnson (mjohnson) with an expected check-in date of 2026-03-13 using the 'Short-Term Loan' status. Check out Asset Tag 'LIB-CAM-001' to Sarah Smith (ssmith) with an expected check-in date of 2026-03-10 using the 'Short-Term Loan' status. Check in Asset Tag 'LIB-IPAD-001' from David Kim, update its status to 'Out for Repair', and record the note 'Screen cracked during loan'.
